title: What It Actually Looks Like to Want a Wife and Not Need One
caption:
A godly man wants a wife. He doesn't need one.

Reach for God first and the ache for her stops running the show. Seek first the kingdom, and everything else finds its place, her included (Matthew 6:33).

#faith #christianman #godlymanhood #singleness #vision
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
